query: SELECT id, slug, status, CASE WHEN htmlContent IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN htmlContent = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE CONCAT('HAS_CONTENT_', CHAR_LENGTH(htmlContent), '_chars') END as html_status FROM newsletters LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute SELECT id, slug, status, CASE WHEN htmlContent IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN htmlContent = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE CONCAT('HAS_CONTENT_', CHAR_LENGTH(htmlContent), '_chars') END as html_status FROM newsletters LIMIT 5;
